public_rule: No forms · no text inputs · no uploads · no cookies · no analytics · no wallets · no payments · no external AI calls · no personal or confidential data · zero value moved.

labs.title: Action Graph & Human Authority
labs.why: Turns action into a scoped graph with human authority, rollback, and receipts.
labs.best: Executives, reviewers, compliance teams, AI delivery leads.

labs.title: Proof-Carrying Artifact & Evolution Ledger
labs.why: Lets reusable capability earn upgrade rights through evidence, rollback, and evolution ledgers.
labs.best: Product teams, AI platform teams, governance stewards.

labs.title: Independent Replay & Claim Promotion
labs.why: Shows that one run is not proof; replay makes a claim institutionally usable.
labs.best: Research reviewers, auditors, grant evaluators, diligence teams.

labs.title: ProofZero Planning & Evidence Reanalyze
labs.why: Plans over proof-relevant work states instead of persuasive futures.
labs.best: AI operators, mission designers, evaluation teams.

labs.title: Proof-Gated Mission Foundry & Curriculum
labs.why: Turns accepted proof into the next harder mission and curriculum.
labs.best: Program owners, frontier evaluation teams, autonomous work architects.

labs.title: Process-Resolved Evidence
labs.why: Shows that final output is not enough; process traces and lineage make evidence reviewable.
labs.best: Corporate reviewers, analysts, legal/compliance observers, AI assurance teams.

labs.title: Blockchain Credibility Standard
labs.why: Shows why credible blockchain projects need proof packages before trust, reputation, governance, or settlement readiness.
labs.best: Blockchain teams, DAOs, foundations, auditors, validators, investors, users.

labs.title: Blockchain Proof Mandate & Due Diligence
labs.why: Turns blockchain credibility into a requirement that stakeholders can ask for, score, and enforce.
labs.best: Users, DAO delegates, grant committees, treasury councils, auditors, investors, partners.

labs.title: Proof Before Settlement Research Standard
labs.why: Turns the proof-to-settlement thesis into a paper, adoption blueprint, and due-diligence standard.
labs.best: Foundations, DAOs, auditors, investors, exchanges, enterprises, partners.

labs.title: Executive AI Proof Console
labs.why: Makes GoalOS obvious to first-time visitors with a role-based, public-safe proof gate.
labs.best: Executives, DAO delegates, auditors, investors, enterprises, AI operators.

labs.title: From Loop to RSI
labs.why: Connects proof loops to deterministic invention governance and RSI readiness.
labs.best: Frontier labs, governance teams, sovereign strategy leads.

labs.title: Loop → RSI → ASI Console
labs.why: Shows the superintelligence control boundary: promotion cannot self-authorize.
labs.best: Safety leads, architecture councils, frontier lab directors.

labs.title: ASI Superintelligence Control Tower
labs.why: Runs explanation modes, stress tests, rollback drills, council review, and Move‑37 dossier handling.
labs.best: Boards, councils, sovereign programs, assurance teams.

labs.title: ASI Mission Simulator
labs.why: Lets visitors experience the complete Loop → RSI → ASI path in one guided, button-only interactive lab.
labs.best: Everyone: first-time visitors, executives, reviewers, blockchain teams, and RSI/ASI governance audiences.
